goal: Remove the browser warning about slider-vertical by updating Omega Wave Editor vertical range slider styling to the modern writing-mode based approach.
constraints: Keep the change tightly scoped to vertical range slider styling and the components that use it.
Do not modify toolbar ordering, docking, popout, playback, waveform, or layout preset logic.
Preserve the current visual orientation and interaction of the affected sliders.
Only touch files that are necessary for this warning cleanup.
Do not revert or overwrite unrelated local changes.
success_criteria: The use of slider-vertical is removed from the renderer codebase for the affected UI controls.
Vertical sliders still render vertically using a standards-friendly approach.
A relevant local check such as typecheck is reported.
